parameters.query:
INSERT INTO opportunities (project_id, opp_type, title, url, funder, status, notes, discovered_at)
SELECT p.id, $1, $2, $3, $4, 'open', $5, NOW()
FROM projects p WHERE p.slug = 'film-opps'
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM opportunities o WHERE o.title = $2 AND o.project_id = p.id)
RETURNING id, title;
